ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name of the author */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the author */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the publication belongs to */,
  "merge_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merge status of the publication records */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords describing the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the digital file of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_merge_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("merge_status_id") REFERENCES merge_statuses ("merge_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, librarian, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merge_statuses" (
  "merge_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merge status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the merge status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the merge status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a publication */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the version was published */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
